settings.text: Nine techs, six service bays, one promise: the price you're quoted is the price on your invoice. Independently owned, locally operated, built on referrals.
Built around the service department we wished existed.

Torque opened in 2012 in a two-bay rental off Milwaukie Avenue. The founding idea was simple: bring factory-level diagnostic work and warranty standards to an independent shop, and hold prices to what the job actually costs.

Fourteen years later we run six bays, a lift-equipped alignment rack, OEM scan tools for every major brand, and a team of nine ASE-certified techs. The shop is clean enough to host customer coffee in the waiting room — and we do.
Still independently owned. Still local. Still answering the phone with the same promise we opened with: the price quoted is the price paid.

settings.title: Two bays and a phone.
settings.description: Torque opens in a rented two-bay shop in inner SE Portland with a single ASE-certified tech and the promise of transparent pricing.

settings.title: Master Tech on the floor.
settings.description: First ASE Master Technician joins the crew. Scope expands to include transmission work, diagnostics on luxury brands, and pre-purchase inspections.

settings.title: Move to the six-bay facility.
settings.description: Outgrew the original shop. Moved to the current purpose-built six-bay facility with a clean lobby, alignment rack, and customer waiting area.

settings.title: Fleet services launched.
settings.description: Added dedicated fleet service for small Portland businesses. Priority scheduling, dedicated advisor, consistent pricing across vehicles.

settings.title: Nine techs, EV-certified.
settings.description: Team at current size with four high-voltage-certified techs for hybrid and EV service. Still independently owned, still booking on the same number we opened with.

settings.title: ASE-certified, all of them.
settings.description: The crew that actually works on your car. Every tech holds current ASE certifications in their specialty area — we pay for the renewals, they keep the credentials current.

settings.name: Marcus Chen
settings.bio: Founded Torque in 2012. ASE Master Technician since 2013, L1 Advanced Engine Performance certified. 24 years on the tools.

settings.name: Alicia Wood
settings.bio: The voice on the phone and the face at the counter. Eight years at Torque, nine before that at a dealer service department. Knows every customer by name.

settings.name: Jordan Patel
settings.bio: ASE-certified in six areas including electrical and engine performance. Runs the scan tools and the tricky diagnostic jobs. Six years at Torque.

settings.name: Eli Bennett
settings.bio: ASE-certified with current high-voltage certifications for hybrid and EV service. Four years at Torque. Handles Tesla, Rivian, and every major hybrid platform.

settings.text: Book a first visit and ask for a shop tour — we'll walk you through the bays before we touch the car.
